summary: While the role offers an exceptional 9-to-5 schedule and a sustainable, low-burnout environment that aligns with your lifestyle goals, it presents a significant mismatch with your professional strengths. The position demands high-level quantitative skills, biostatistics, and complex logical deduction, which are areas you have identified as personal struggles. Because the role relies on independent analytical judgment rather than the procedural, protocol-driven work you excel at, the mental strain of the daily tasks would likely undermine your personal wellbeing.
